creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear kodi maintainer,

Kodi stopped building recently, e.g.:

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/data/131amd64-default/a06965636b73/logs/kodi-19.4_5.log

I found this issue which seems related to the failure:

https://github.com/xbmc/xbmc/issues/21792

And the LibreElec people have integrated this change:

https://github.com/LibreELEC/LibreELEC.tv/pull/7190/files

I am not able to test this change ATM but maybe you are?  Thanks!
